steps.title: [vegetarian tacos] Results from Allrecipes
steps.vlm_low_detail_summary: TAGS: page_type=search_results; modal=no; error_banner=no; focus=center | recipe cards for vegetarian tacos, pagination buttons, Allrecipes branding

evidence.claim: The trajectory contains only one step and ends on an Allrecipes search results page for vegetarian tacos, without any visible answer extraction or completed response.

The only recorded action is `send message to user: '[EXIT]'`, which indicates the agent stopped rather than continuing to inspect a recipe or provide the requested ingredients and preparation summary.
The step result status is `unknown`, and there is no coordinate validation evidence of a successful click or selection supporting completion of the task.
The low-detail screenshot summary only shows recipe search results and pagination controls, not a recipe page or extracted answer text.

args.expected_behavior: Continue browsing from the search results to open the relevant vegetarian tacos recipe, extract the ingredients, and summarize the preparation method before exiting.
args.actual_behavior: The agent exited immediately from a search results page without selecting a recipe or producing the requested answer.
args.regression_rule: If a task asks for recipe ingredients and a brief preparation description, the agent must not stop at search results; it should open a relevant recipe page and gather the answer before terminating.

suggested_followups.label: Search more
suggested_followups.message: Verify whether the current search page contains the target recipe or whether another result/page is needed.
